name: Darklord Enchantment
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>惑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>堕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Send 1 "Darklord" monster from your hand or face-up field to the GY; take control of 1 face-up monster your opponent controls until the End Phase. You can only activate 1 "Darklord Enchantment" per turn.
eff: Send 1 "Darklord" monster from your hand or face-up field to the GY; take control of 1 face-up monster your opponent controls until the End Phase. You can only activate 1 "Darklord Enchantment" per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Takes control of an opponent's monster
